title: Passbook
details:
Purchase of LGR PASSBOOK: ₱500 (fully credited to account)
• Minimum deposit: ₱500
• Maintaining balance: ₱500

Booking Privileges:
• ₱2,500 – Hotel Room
• ₱3,500 – Grand Studio
• ₱4,250 – Deluxe Studio
• ₱5,000 – 1-Bedroom Unit
• ₱6,800 – 2-Bedroom Premier / 14th Floor

title: Passport
details:
✨ Passport Perks Are Here! ✨
Your all-access pass to exclusive stays, treats, and discounts at La Grande Residence valid for 6 months 💫

Enjoy these FREE perks:
• Complimentary stay in our Grand Studio
• Free access to the pool & fitness gym during your stay
• 1-hour Sauna for 2 guests
• 1-hour Gaming Room access

Plus, receive additional vouchers:
• Up to 15% OFF room discounts
• One-time early check-in & late check-out
• Up to 10% OFF laundry services
• 10% OFF Japanese Head Spa
• 10% OFF spa massage
• 10% OFF manicure & pedicure
• 10% OFF LGR Sauna
• Up to 10% OFF shuttle service
• 10% OFF Gaming Room & Tennis Court
• 10% OFF Sky Lounge Italian & Coffee Lounge

🎟️ More perks. More comfort. More reasons to stay.
